title: 15 Pieces 14CM/5.5in Christmas Flowers Glitter Artificial Poinsettia Flowers Xmas Tree Ornaments with Clips Stems for DIY Wreath Party House Holiday Decoration (Champagne)
features: Package And Size: 15 PCS poinsettia artificial flowers, 15 PCS clips and 15 PCS stems. The diameter of the poinsettia Christmas decorations is about 14 cm / 5.5 ines
With Clips and Stems: The Christmas tree decorations set come with clips and stems. You can easily attach them to Christmas tree, Christmas wreath or garlands
Easy to Use: Just insert the clip tip into the Christmas artificial flowers base tube then clamp anywhere you would like to decorate
Occasions: The Christmas flowers can be used for decorating garlands, Xmas tree, rattans, crafts, mantle, floral arrangements, stair banisters, windows, fireplace, etc

Note: Due to long distance transport, some glitter powder will drop from artificial Christmas flowers, that is normal. The Xmas tree flowers might have smell when you open the package. Just air it out for 1 to 2 days. The smell would go away
